title: Yun Shen Buzhi Meng Special: Zhu Ming Zhi Yi

synonyms: 云深不知梦 特别篇
Eclipse of Illusion Special: The Battle of Qiumina
alternative_titles.en: Eclipse of Illusion SP: The Miasma War
alternative_titles.ja: 云深不知梦 特别篇：逐冥之役

synopsis:
In the primordial apocalypse, Xihe, a maiden of the Huihua Clan, fled the brutal rebellion in her ancestral homeland. Breaking free from the control of the Qiongming Demon Tribe, she embarks on a quest for the Demonslayer Divine Sword, igniting the War of the Six Armies.

(Source: Youku)
